title: racinaea spiculosa var. micrantha
intro: Racinaea spiculosa var. micrantha, also known as the miniature spiky air plant, is a type of epiphyte belonging to the family Bromeliaceae. Traditionally, Racinaea spiculosa var. micrantha has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Ecuador and Peru, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Racinaea spiculosa var. micrantha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
